step.title: Load sprint and CR
step.action: Read the current sprint-status.md and the approved change request document.

step.title: Reprioritize
step.action: Reprioritize the sprint backlog to accommodate the change request. Identify stories to defer if needed.

step.title: Adjust scope
step.action: Adjust the sprint scope: add new stories from the CR and remove or defer lower-priority stories to maintain capacity.

step.title: Update sprint-status
step.action: Update docs/implementation-artifacts/sprint-status.md with the revised scope, priorities, and rationale.
